Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Provided 38 TCE Employees with upskilling program for Introduction to Semiconductor Manufacturing and Controlled Environments. Instruction was provided by faculty from across ECEE, Professor Emeritus from ASU SEEBE, and industry experts. A second course will be launched in the coming months in ad...
